text.zh: YOLO 是当前 legacy 展示中的一个 AI 历史节点。
text.en: YOLO is an AI history milestone in the current legacy presentation.

text.zh: YOLO 把目标检测重新表述为单次回归问题。它不再先提候选区域再逐个分类，而是让一个网络从整张图一次性预测边界框和类别概率。这个思路让实时目标检测成为主流工程目标。
text.en: YOLO reframed object detection as a single regression problem. Instead of proposing regions and classifying them separately, one network predicted bounding boxes and class probabilities from the whole image in one pass. The result made real-time object detection a mainstream engineering target.
